Our Story

Built on Vision,
Driven by Expertise

Founded by Mohanraj S., Nixtion was born from a singular conviction — that businesses deserve IT partnerships that match their ambition. We don't just manage infrastructure; we architect futures.

Our team brings expertise across web development, e-commerce, ERP systems, IT support, hosting, lead management, data analytics, tech guidance, and real-world training.

Every engagement is guided by our founding principle: technology should be invisible when it works, and indispensable when it matters.

Work With Us
